prompt: A surreal scene of multiple small rivers flowing downhill in one direction, but when viewed from above they collectively form a large river flowing in the opposite direction, impossible perspective, dreamlike but physically grounded environment, natural landscape, no text, no charts, no symbols, uncanny contradiction, cinematic lighting, realistic textures
